description_long: This factory building complex consists of multiple rectangular structures arranged around a central courtyard or park area, featuring a symmetrical layout. The buildings are primarily mid-rise, with flat roofs and a mix of concrete, glass, and brick facades. The central area is landscaped with trees, pathways, and a circular plaza, suggesting a blend of industrial and civic functions. Several of the buildings have large, grid-like windows typical of industrial architecture, and some rooftops display mechanical equipment. The color palette includes shades of gray, beige, and muted red, with green from the landscaped courtyard. The overall design reflects a modern industrial style with utilitarian forms and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern industrial factory complex with multiple mid-rise buildings, large windows, and a landscaped central courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical building arrangement, and the landscaped central courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the complex, the central park, and the alignment of the buildings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tallest building with a clock tower and additional industrial structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the central courtyard and the distribution of buildings around it.
